Petiton To Authorize And Instruct The Personal Representative To Bring An Unlawful Detainer Action And To Pay Litigation Counsel'S Fees On A Current Basis, And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sara King for and with Petitioner Robert Macpherson.

Ms. King presented an update, stated that APS has been involved in this matter for some time, that her client attempted to go out to clean the home, and that the attempt to clean was stopped by James Macpherson. In addition, Ms. King stated that her client returned with the police, that the police detained James Macpherson, and that James Macpherson will be detained until September 20, 2013. At the conclusion of the update, the Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)
